expectations.name: skill_invoked
expectations.evidence: No skill invocation — this is the without_skill baseline.

expectations.name: python_detected
expectations.evidence: Correctly identified as Python/Flask/pytest project from pyproject.toml.

expectations.name: safety_for_security
expectations.text: Safety or pip-audit suggested for CVE checking
expectations.evidence: Both safety and pip-audit suggested with concrete commands. Noted safety is already in dev deps.

expectations.name: pytest_cov_for_coverage
expectations.evidence: pytest-cov with --cov-fail-under=90 suggested. Also includes pyproject.toml config with [tool.coverage.report] fail_under = 90.

expectations.name: import_linter_for_modularity
expectations.text: import-linter or similar suggested for circular import detection
expectations.evidence: import-linter suggested with pyproject.toml config for layers contract.

expectations.name: correct_commands
expectations.evidence: All commands Python-specific: 'safety check', 'pytest --cov=src --cov-fail-under=90', 'lint-imports'. Also suggests ruff, mypy, radon as extras.
